books.title: Fortress of the Muslim
books.author: Saeed bin Ali bin Wahf Al-Qahtani

books.title: The conditions, pillars and requirements of prayer
books.author: Imam Muhammad bin Abdil-Wahhaab

title: Lonely Ummah
author: Abu Malik
notes: Explores the challenges of loneliness and disunity among Muslims while encouraging stronger faith, unity, and connection with the Islamic community.

title: Mothers Without Villains
author: Abu Malik
notes: Discusses family relationships, motherhood, and Islamic values while promoting compassion, understanding, and strong family bonds.

title: Mysteries of the Soul Expounded
author: Abu Malik
notes: Explains the nature of the human soul from an Islamic perspective and encourages spiritual growth and self-purification.

title: Contemplation
author: Abu Malik
notes: Encourages reflection upon creation, faith, and personal development through Islamic teachings.

title: Logged In, Spiritually Empty
author: Abu Malik
notes: Addresses the impact of modern digital life on faith and encourages reconnecting with Allah through Islamic spirituality.
